title: schedonorus auratus
intro: Schedonorus auratus, also known as golden oats or meadow oats, is a type of flowering plant in the grass family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin from infections. The health benefits of Schedonorus auratus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
